generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Swing angle measurements transmitted via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Wind speed measurements transmitted via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series swing angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series wind speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 CAD model of gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutodeskFusion360
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic simulation model of crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB for time-series data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data visualization and dashboarding tool"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService
]

instance ContainerizedDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for deploying containerized components"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentInsight
]

instance DeploymentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confirmation of successful container deployment"
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for system deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContainerizedDeploymentService
]

instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for gantry crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService
]

instance Arduino : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microcontroller for actuation control"
    DTDFVocab:enables ActuationService
]

instance TMC4671Eval : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Motor controller for stepper motors"
    DTDFVocab:enables ActuationService
]

instance CADModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "CAD model creation and management service"
    DTDFVocab:provides CADModelInsight
]

instance CADModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "CAD model validation and management insights"
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling tool for crane design"
    DTDFVocab:enables CADModelingService
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering tool using Arcadia method"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemModelingService
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane dynamics in real-time"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulatedTrajectoryInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares measured trajectories against simulated ones for validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryValidationInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs sensor data to TimescaleDB database"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataLogInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Displays real-time and historical data on Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance DataTransmissionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Transmits sensor data via MQTT to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionInsight
]

instance ActuationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Controls CartMotor, HoistMotor, and Electromagnet"
    DTDFVocab:provides ActuationAction
]

instance SystemModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Models system evolution phases using DarTwin notation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemEvolutionInsight
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Provides optimal path for crane movement"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

    base:desc "Real-time simulated crane trajectory data"
]

instance TrajectoryValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Notifies operators of trajectory breaches via Grafana dashboard"
]

instance HistoricalDataLogInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data successfully stored in TimescaleDB for historical analysis"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane state and validation results"
]

instance DataTransmissionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Sensor data successfully transmitted via MQTT"
]

instance ActuationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Actuates motors and electromagnet based on trajectory"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SystemEvolutionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System evolution phases documented using DarTwin notation"
]

    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling cart movement"
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling hoist movement"
]

    base:desc "Electromagnet for container pickup"
]

    base:desc "TimescaleDB database container"
]

instance Dashboard : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard container"
]

instance TrajectoryGenerator : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Trajectory generation service container"
]

instance Simulation : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Crane dynamics simulation container"
]

instance ContinuousValidation : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service container"
]

instance MQTTBrokerContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker container"
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system inspired by Antwerp harbor cranes"
    base:contains PhysicalSystem, DigitalTwin
]

instance PhysicalSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical components of the crane system"
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartMotor, HoistMotor, Electromagnet, Arduino, TMC4671Eval
]

instance DigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized digital twin system"
    base:contains Database, Dashboard, TrajectoryGenerator, Simulation, ContinuousValidation, MQTTBrokerContainer
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory commands from Trajectory Generator Service and operator inputs from Human Machine Interface sent via Control Application and Crane Interface to physical motors and electromagnet."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization for validation and logging, with no specific time intervals specified beyond 'continuous' operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized architecture where physical crane components interact with digital services via MQTT; all components deployed on a single PC with Docker containerization for Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As designed (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360) and as operated (real-time monitoring, control, and validation during operation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service compares real-time measurements with simulations, calculates distance metrics against thresholds, and uses confidence bounds (e.g., blue/yellow bounds in Grafana) to assess model validity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for all communication between physical sensors/controllers and digital services, with data routed to TimescaleDB for storage."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All components deployed on a single personal computer; Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard services containerized via Docker with single-command docker-compose orchestration."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Expanded to harbor system with container identification and ship digital twin (buoyancy model) during teaching use cases at University of Antwerp and Gran Sasso Science Institute."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Uses Capella for Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) but no specific digital twin standards followed; ad-hoc implementation using open-source tools without dedicated digital twin frameworks."
]
